chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail. Appl. No.2228 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 02.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Moosa, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Muhammad Ashraf is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.289/2024 U/s 381, 406, 34 PPC of P.S. Memon Goth, Karachi. He is present on ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to him vide order dated 30.09.2024 and today matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, complainant, who is owner of Rajput Diary Farm at cattle colony, Karachi has alleged theft of medicine for animals from his Dairy Farm amounting to Rs.4,50000/- on 12.08.2024 against applicant and co-accused Niaz, who both are his employees, in his absence when he was in UK for a short time. 3. After FIR, applicant has joined investigation but nothing has been recovered from him. The alleged offence does not carry punishment of more than 07 years, and the case has been challaned, hence the applicant is no more required for further investigation. Further, the case has been registered against the applicant and co-accused on presumption that they have committed alleged theft. On these grounds, applicant’s counsel has pleaded for bail, opposed by learned Addl.P.G. However, in view of above facts and circumstances, the case for bail has been made out. 4. Accordingly, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.

Accordingly, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
